author: Hello + Claude
description: Kicks members who haven't received any of one or more designated 'verified' roles (e.g. Member) within a configurable number of days after joining.
install_msg: Thanks for installing AutoKick! Run `[p]autokick role add @Member` and `[p]autokick days 3` to get started, then `[p]autokick toggle true` to enable it.
short: Kick members who never get verified within N days of joining.
